subject: Magikarp — a small orange fish Pokemon leaping from water
description: A small orange fish Pokemon is depicted mid-leap above a body of water, mouth open in what reads as a surprised or strained expression. The creature has large round eyes, prominent orange and yellow scale markings, a wide open mouth, and visible fin-like appendages. The water surface below is rendered in blue with white splash lines. The background is a pale plain sky, consistent with the original Base Set era flat illustration style by Mitsuhiro Arita.
foreground: orange fish Pokemon leaping from water
background: simple water surface and pale sky
